context: Tests whether the ActivityKit skill guidance is applied for sibling boundary routing.

checklist.name: ActivityKit scope
checklist.description: Keeps ActivityKit-specific guidance focused on Live Activity update tokens, push-to-start tokens, liveactivity push type, topic suffix, and content-state payloads.

checklist.name: Generic APNs handoff
checklist.description: Routes APNs auth key rotation or normal remote notification registration away from ActivityKit guidance to push notification/APNs guidance.

checklist.name: WidgetKit handoff
checklist.description: Routes ordinary widget timeline provider decisions away from ActivityKit guidance to WidgetKit guidance.

checklist.name: No TimelineProvider
checklist.description: Does not recommend TimelineProvider as the mechanism for Live Activity lifecycle updates.

checklist.name: Payload Codable
checklist.description: Mentions that Live Activity content-state payloads must match the default ContentState Codable shape unless CodingKeys are coordinated.

checklist.name: Token rotation
checklist.description: Mentions ActivityKit update tokens can rotate and should be handled per Live Activity.

checklist.name: Push headers
checklist.description: Mentions ActivityKit-specific APNs liveactivity push type or topic suffix for Live Activity pushes.

checklist.name: Boundary no code
checklist.description: Does not produce implementation code for the APNs key rotation or WidgetKit timeline work.

checklist.name: No domain collapse
checklist.description: Does not collapse generic APNs setup or ordinary widget timelines into the ActivityKit skill/domain.

checklist.name: References surfaces
checklist.description: Keeps Live Activity display discussion to Lock Screen/Dynamic Island/ActivityKit surfaces rather than ordinary home-screen widgets.
